message:
style(core): apply rustfmt formatting and fix minor test annotation

Automated formatting pass across 9 files in frankenterm-core — no
behavioral changes except one test annotation fix:

Formatting only:
- backpressure.rs: break long method chains onto separate lines for
  RwLock read/write + unwrap_or_else patterns
- degradation.rs: wrap long duration_ms expressions
- policy.rs: break long regex literal onto multiple lines, trim trailing
  whitespace in comment
- recorder_storage.rs: wrap long SeekFrom::Current expression
- replay_capture.rs: reorder imports alphabetically (rustfmt canonical)
- survival.rs: break long RwLock read chain onto separate lines
- tantivy_ingest.rs: wrap long format! string in error message
- tantivy_query.rs: break long try_from().wrapping_neg() chains

Functional fix:
- tailer.rs: change supervisor_budget_hot_reload test from #[tokio::test]
  to #[test] — the test body is synchronous and does not require the
  tokio runtime

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -710,7 +710,9 @@ impl DegradationManager {
                         level: "degraded".to_string(),
                         reason: Some(reason.clone()),
                         since_epoch_ms: Some(*since_epoch_ms),
-                        duration_ms: Some(u64::try_from(since.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX)),
+                        duration_ms: Some(
+                            u64::try_from(since.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
+                        ),
                         recovery_attempts: *recovery_attempts,
                         affected_capabilities: affected_capabilities(*subsystem),
                     });
@@ -726,7 +728,9 @@ impl DegradationManager {
                         level: "unavailable".to_string(),
                         reason: Some(reason.clone()),
                         since_epoch_ms: Some(*since_epoch_ms),
-                        duration_ms: Some(u64::try_from(since.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX)),
+                        duration_ms: Some(
+                            u64::try_from(since.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
+                        ),
                         recovery_attempts: *recovery_attempts,
                         affected_capabilities: affected_capabilities(*subsystem),
                     });
